calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-24-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Martin Figueroa Acosta.
Default entered against defendant on February 14, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at prove-up hearing filed March 27, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on February 14, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant Martin Figueroa Acosta as follows:

Damages/Principal - $28,706.30.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,139.70.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs $390.00, for a total of $32,736.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
